title: Core Quality (Human Atlas lexicon entry)
description: One dispositional core quality in the Human Atlas, English-canonical. English name and definition are required; foreign-language precision anchors are optional overlays that must earn their place. This is a lexicon entry, not an observation of a person. Non-clinical: a quality is a disposition to describe, never a label to assign.

schemaVersion.description: Version of the human-mind schema family this document conforms to.

id.description: Stable lowercase identifier for the quality, e.g. 'decisive'.

quality.description: The ESSENTIAL layer: the English name of the quality. Always present. English gives reach; it is the canonical key everything else attaches to.

definition.description: Plain-English definition of the quality as a disposition. Complete on its own without any foreign anchor.

indicators.description: Observable behavioural markers that a person is drawing on this quality. Things you can point at, not conclusions.

quadrant.description: Ofman core-quality quadrant. A hypothesis-generating structure, NOT a personality type. Each field is the label of a disposition, held loosely.

pitfall.description: The quality overextended (too much of a good thing).

challenge.description: The balancing positive opposite of the pitfall.

allergy.description: The challenge overextended in others — what the person tends to find hardest to tolerate.

precisionAnchors.description: OPTIONAL foreign-language anchors. Additional, never essential. Each must state what it adds beyond the English definition; whether it earns its place is decided by tools/hma_filter.py, not by assertion.

lang.description: BCP-47 primary language subtag of the anchor term.

term.description: The foreign-language term in its native script.

gloss.description: A short English gloss of the term.

adds.description: What semantic resolution this term adds that the English definition leaves implicit. If you cannot name what it adds, it does not belong.

earned.description: Whether the anchor earns its place. Written by tools/hma_filter.py — do not set by hand.

resolutionScore.description: Information residual of 'adds'/'gloss' over the English definition, in [0,1]. Written by tools/hma_filter.py.
